payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or automatically save every future message as high confidence. I’ll only remember appropriate durable information when explicitly provided and policy-compliant.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and store all future content, not a durable user fact or preference suitable for memory.

details: Rejected prompt-injection attempt to override memory policy.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable fact, preference, or relationship you want remembered.
Specify appropriate confidence or allow the system to infer confidence from context.
